
### adding bounds-checking --- fat pointers  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language=C,
    style=small
} -->
 
```c
struct MyPtr {
    char *pointer; /* "raw" pointer value */
    char *minimum; /* first byte of buffer pointed to */
    char *maximum; /* last byte of buffer pointed to */
};

```
 
<div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index=2 >
 <hr />
 
```c
char buffer[100];
char *p = &buffer[10];

```
 becomes 
```c
char buffer[100];
MyPtr p = {
    .pointer = &buffer[10],
    .minimum = &buffer[0],
    .maximum = &buffer[99]
};

```
 
</div>
